title: Market Share Brief: starter trace demo
denominator: Reachable product teams actively evaluating a starter workflow or operating-model reset

estimates.basis: Incumbent share remains high among teams that want connected discovery and delivery inside an existing suite.
Initial reachable share for teams explicitly prioritizing lifecycle traceability and PM operating-model clarity.

sensitivity_notes: Reachable share drops if bundled incumbents absorb starter evaluations before traceability pain becomes explicit.
prioritization_implications: The starter should prioritize a crisp differentiating wedge rather than broad template coverage.
Low reachable share reinforces the need to preserve reviewable proof and explicit displacement rationale.
